mapper.select: SELECT P.PRODUCT_NO, P.PRODUCT_NAME,P.PRODUCT_DETAILS, P.ORIGINAL_PRICE, P.IMG_URL, P.PRO_TYPE FROM PRODUCT P LEFT JOIN COMPANY C ON P.COMPANY_NO = C.COMPANY_NO WHERE C.USER_ID = #{userid} AND PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo}
SELECT P.PRODUCT_NO, P.PRODUCT_NAME,P.PRODUCT_DETAILS, P.ORIGINAL_PRICE, P.IMG_URL FROM PRODUCT P LEFT JOIN COMPANY C ON P.COMPANY_NO = C.COMPANY_NO WHERE C.USER_ID = #{userid};
mapper.update: UPDATE PRODUCT SET PRODUCT_NAME = #{productName}, PRODUCT_DETAILS = #{productDetails}, ORIGINAL_PRICE = #{originalPrice}, IMG_URL = #{imgUrl}, PRO_TYPE = #{proType} WHERE PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PRODUCT(PRODUCT_NAME, PRODUCT_DETAILS, ORIGINAL_PRICE, IMG_URL, PRO_TYPE, COMPANY_NO) VALUES(#{productName}, #{productDetails}, #{originalPrice}, #{imgUrl}, #{proType}, #{companyNo})
mapper.select: SELECT r.res_no, r.res_status, r.user_id AS res_user_id, -- 실제 예약한 유저의 아이디 r.product_no, p.product_name, r.res_date, r.res_time, r.res_content, r.use_date, r.use_time, p.deposit, m.tel, r.pay_date FROM company c -- 1. 업체 테이블과 상품 테이블 연결 (이 업체가 가진 상품들) JOIN product p ON c.company_no = p.company_no -- 2. 상품 테이블과 예약 테이블 연결 (그 상품들에 들어온 예약들) JOIN reservation r ON p.product_no = r.product_no -- 3. 조건: 업체 테이블의 로그인 아이디가 'sunsu09'인 경우 left join member m on m.user_id = r.user_id -- WHERE c.user_id = 'sunsu09'

SELECT COUNT(RES_NO) new_res_cnt FROM company c -- 1. 업체 테이블과 상품 테이블 연결 (이 업체가 가진 상품들) JOIN product p ON c.company_no = p.company_no -- 2. 상품 테이블과 예약 테이블 연결 (그 상품들에 들어온 예약들) JOIN reservation r ON p.product_no = r.product_no -- 3. 조건: 업체 테이블의 로그인 아이디가 'sunsu09'인 경우 left join member m on m.user_id = r.user_id -- WHERE c.user_id = 'sunsu09' AND R.RES_STATUS = 'WAIT'

select p.product_no, p.product_name, p.img_url, count(review_no) reviewCount from product p left join review r on p.product_no = r.product_no and r.is_paid = 1 where p.company_no = ( select company_no cmpNo from company c where c.user_id = 'sunsu09') group by p.product_no, p.product_name, p.img_url;

select p.product_no, p.product_name, p.img_url, count(review_no) reviewCount from product p left join review r on p.product_no = r.product_no and r.is_paid = 0 where p.company_no = ( select company_no cmpNo from company c where c.user_id = 'sunsu09') group by p.product_no, p.product_name, p.img_url;
select count(company_no) reviewCount from review r where r.is_paid = 1 and updated = 1 and r.company_no = ( select company_no from company c where user_id = 'sunsu09')
select count(company_no) reviewCount from review r where r.is_paid = 0 and updated = 1 and r.company_no = ( select company_no from company c where user_id = 'sunsu09')

select r.reg_date, r.img_description, r.is_paid, r.review_no, r.user_id, r.company_no, r.product_no, r.rating, r.content, r.img_url, r.updated from review r where is_paid = 1 and product_no = #{productNo};
SELECT r.review_no, r.content, r.user_id, r.rating, r.updated FROM REVIEW r WHERE IS_PAID = 0 AND PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo};

SELECT P.PRODUCT_NO, P.COMPANY_NO, P.IMG_URL, P.PRODUCT_NAME, C.COM_NAME, P.PRODUCT_DETAILS, P.ORIGINAL_PRICE, P.PRO_TYPE, P.TAG, P.DEPOSIT FROM PRODUCT P LEFT JOIN COMPANY C ON P.COMPANY_NO = C.COMPANY_NO;
SELECT r.use_time FROM reservation r where r.product_no = #{productNo} and r.res_status = 'WAIT' and r.use_date = #{useDate};
mapper.insert: insert into reservation values( null, #{userId}, #{productNo}, #{companyNo}, now(), now(), 'WAIT', #{resContent}, #{useDate}, #{useTime}, null, null);
mapper.select: select r.res_no, r.user_id, m.tel, r.product_no, r.company_no, c.com_name, r.res_date, r.res_time, r.res_status, r.res_content, r.use_date, r.use_time, r.pay_date, r.pay_no, p.product_name, p.product_details, p.original_price, p.is_active, p.img_url, p.pro_type, p.tag, p.deposit, pr.amount, pr.pay_status, pr.refund, pr.refund_date from reservation r left join product p on p.product_no = r.product_no left join payment_reservation pr on r.res_no = pr.res_no inner join company c on c.company_no = r.company_no inner join member m on m.user_id = r.user_id where r.user_id = 'maygirl05'
mapper.update: update reservation set res_status = 'CANCEL' where res_status = 'WAIT' and res_date is not null and res_time is not null and timestampdiff(minute, addtime(res_date, res_time), now()) >= 30 and user_id = 'maygirl05'
